summary.en: Tuya T5AI flagship evaluation board with audio codec, LED, and configurable display/camera modules.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 旗舰评估板，搭载音频编解码器、LED，支持可配置显示屏与摄像头模块。

summary.en: Tuya T5AI engineering validation board with audio AEC and display.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 工程验证板，集成音频回声消除与显示屏。

summary.en:
Tuya T5AI-Core Development Kit is a highly integrated voice core development board based on the T5-E1 module. The T5-E1 module, independently developed by Tuya Smart, incorporates embedded Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities, making it suitable for a variety of smart hardware scenarios. This board features an onboard microphone and speaker, supporting local voice recognition and audio playback to meet the requirements of voice interaction applications.

The board is equipped with a 44-pin header, making it easy for you to quickly develop and prototype AIoT projects. An onboard lithium battery power management circuit supports low-power design, suitable for developing mobile and portable smart devices.

This board provides extensive hardware interfaces and comprehensive voice functionality, so it stands out as an ideal choice for you to develop AIoT voice interaction applications.
summary.zh-CN:
涂鸦 T5AI-Core 开发套件是一款基于 T5-E1 模组的高集成度语音核心开发板。T5-E1 模组由涂鸦智能自主研发，集成了嵌入式 Wi-Fi 与蓝牙功能，适用于多种智能硬件场景。T5AI-Core 开发板板载 1 个麦克风和 1 个扬声器，支持本地语音识别与音频播放，满足语音交互应用需求。

开发板配备 44 Pin 排针，便于开发者进行快速的 AIoT 项目开发与原型验证。板载锂电池电源管理电路，支持低功耗设计，适合移动和便携式智能设备的开发。

本开发板提供了丰富的硬件接口和完善的语音功能，是 AIoT 语音交互应用开发的理想选择。

summary.en: T5AI board with WS2812B pixel LEDs, BMI270 6-axis IMU, buzzer, and multi-button layout.
summary.zh-CN: 搭载 WS2812B 像素灯珠、BMI270 六轴 IMU、蜂鸣器和多按键的 T5AI 评估板。

summary.en: Portable T5AI board with display, camera, AXP2101 PMIC, BMI270 IMU, joystick, and cellular.
summary.zh-CN: 便携式 T5AI 板，集成显示屏、摄像头、AXP2101 电源管理、BMI270 IMU、摇杆与蜂窝模块。

name.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 墨水屏 NFC 板

summary.en: T5AI board with UC8276 E-Ink display, NFC, touch panel, 6-button layout, battery management, and SD card.
summary.zh-CN: 搭载 UC8276 电子墨水屏、NFC、触摸屏、6 按键、电池管理与 SD 卡的 T5AI 板。

summary.en: Compact T5AI board with audio AEC and optional LCD expansion module.
summary.zh-CN: 紧凑型 T5AI 板，支持音频回声消除，可选 LCD 扩展模块。

name.zh-CN: 微雪 T5AI 1.75 寸触摸 AMOLED

summary.en: Waveshare 1.75" 466×466 AMOLED board with T5-E1 module, capacitive touch, QMI8658 IMU, RTC, audio AEC, battery management, and SD card.
summary.zh-CN: 微雪 1.75 寸 466×466 AMOLED 开发板，基于 T5-E1 模组，搭载电容触控、QMI8658 IMU、RTC、音频 AEC、电池管理与 SD 卡。
